interpretation.observed: Under the exact deterministic initial-position depth-2 configuration, North won every game in every batch.
interpretation.independenceWarning: All games began from the same standard initial position with openingPlies=0. Identical aggregate results and exactly 48 average turns in every batch indicate repeated deterministic trajectories rather than 1000 independent opening samples.
interpretation.claimLimit: This result is evidence of a reproducible North-side outcome for this implementation and AI configuration, not proof that Bao la Kiswahili is theoretically a second-player win.
